news.title: A Legacy of Excellence: Maynilad Confers Highest Academic Titles
news.content: On April 2, the Maynilad University Center held a historic Conferment Ceremony at the Li Seng Giap Auditorium, where the titles of Professor Emeritus and Distinguished Professor were conferred upon deserving faculty members.

news.title: Accepted applicants for SY 2025-2026
news.content: The list of accepted applicants for SY 2025-2026 may now be viewed below. For inquiries, please email the Maynilad Admissions Office at admissions@maynilad.edu.

news.title: Maynilad launches CORE Cebu
news.content: The Maynilad University Center launched its first regional executive education hub — Maynilad CORE Cebu — on March 28, 2025, in a milestone event held at the heart of Cebu Business Park.

programs.name: Leadership & Academic Development
programs.description: Seminars, coaching sessions, and workshops that develop professional competence and intellectual growth in university men.

programs.name: Spiritual Formation
programs.description: Guided retreats, recollections, and one-on-one spiritual direction for personal growth in faith and virtue.

programs.name: Cultural & Outdoors
programs.description: Pilgrimages, hiking, cultural immersions, and outdoor activities that broaden perspectives and build camaraderie.

programs.name: Community Outreach
programs.description: Service projects, volunteer work, and social initiatives that instill a spirit of giving back to the community.

programs.name: Mentoring Program
programs.description: Each student is paired with a dedicated personal mentor for regular one-on-one sessions on academic, personal, and professional growth.

programs.name: Sports & Recreation
programs.description: Basketball leagues, team sports, and recreational activities that foster teamwork, discipline, and physical wellness.

staff.name: Arwin Vibar
staff.description: A distinguished faculty member from the University of the Philippines, bringing world-class academic expertise and a passion for intellectual formation.

staff.name: Dennis Yu
staff.description: A dedicated spiritual guide who walks alongside the students of Maynilad, offering pastoral care, direction, and sacramental accompaniment.

staff.name: Janjan Ramirez
staff.description: An accomplished economist who helps students understand the social and economic dimensions of leadership, governance, and professional life.

staff.name: Ariel de Castro
staff.description: A Dual Tech specialist who bridges academic theory with practical skills, equipping students with technical competencies for the modern workforce.

staff.name: Raymond Ng
staff.description: A faculty member from De La Salle University, contributing his expertise in education and leadership development to the Maynilad formation program.

staff.name: Donnell Dimaano
staff.description: A digital media professional who guides students in navigating the modern digital landscape with creativity, responsibility, and purpose.
